zh.lifeSummary: Alwin Mac Muredach Mac Maidouern - First Earl of Lennox是Muredach of Levenach的兒子，於1104年出生在英國蘇格蘭。他於1129年與Oge Dunkeld在英國蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾馮 藍妮克絲結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Mac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Cuong, Minh, Lien, Muoi, Thanh, Tho, Tieu, Vinh, Anh, Beo, Binh, Chau.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 麥 (see   Mai   2) and 莫 (see   Mo   1).
Vietnamese (Mạc): from Chinese 莫 ‘nothing; nonexistent’; see Mo 1.

variants.name: Mai
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Thanh, Hoa, Son, Dung, Long, Binh, Minh, Thu, Hue, Huong, Thuy.  Chinese Chi, Hong, Ho, Sang, Han, Hang, Jian, Li, Man, Mei, Sen, Wei.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 麥, meaning ‘wheat’ in Chinese: (i) from Mai Qiu (麥丘), the title of a man in the state of Qi (located mainly in present-day Shandong province) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), who, despite being very old, came to celebrate the birthday of the Duke Huan of Qi (ruler of the state of Qi, died 643  BC ). His descendants inherited 麥, the first part of his title, as their surname. (ii) borne by descendants of Mai Tie Zhang (麥鐵杖), a famous general during the Sui dynasty (581–618  AD ). His descendants were scattered around southern China.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 買, meaning ‘buy’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of the king Song Weizi, founder of the state of Song. (ii) borne by descendants of the Duke Dao of Xu (ruler of the state of Xu, 546–523  BC ), possibly inheriting his personal name. (iii) from the first element of the personal name Mai Zhu Chu (買朱鉏), style name of an official who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iv) it has also been traced back to other ethnic groups in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 買, meaning ‘buy’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of the king Song Weizi, founder of the state of Song. (ii) borne by descendants of the Duke Dao of Xu (ruler of the state of Xu, 546–523  BC ), possibly inheriting his personal name. (iii) from the first element of the personal name Mai Zhu Chu (買朱鉏), style name of an official who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iv) it has also been traced back to other ethnic groups in northern China.

en.lifeSummary: Alwin Mac Muredach Mac Maidouern - First Earl of Lennox was born in 1104, in Scotland, United Kingdom as the son of Muredach of Levenach. He married Oge Dunkeld in 1129, in The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Alwin Mac Muredach Mac Maidouern - First Earl of Lennox est né en 1104, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, fils de Muredach of Levenach. Il a épousé Oge Dunkeld en 1129, à The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille.

ja.lifeSummary: Alwin Mac Muredach Mac Maidouern - First Earl of Lennoxは1104年にイギリススコットランドでMuredach of Levenachの息子として生まれた。1129年にイギリススコットランドダンバートンシュアイアス レノックスでOge Dunkeldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Alwin Mac Muredach Mac Maidouern - First Earl of Lennox(은)는 1104년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Muredach of Levenach의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1129년 영국 스코틀랜드 던바토실르 테 렌스에서 Oge Dunkeld(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Alwin Mac Muredach Mac Maidouern - First Earl of Lennox родился в 1104 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Muredach of Levenach. Он женился на женщине по имени Oge Dunkeld в 1129 г. в местности т леннокс, дунбартоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь.
